blurb: UK non-profit using legal action, investigations and campaigning to challenge tech harms and government use of technology.

publications.title: How we revealed NHS England claims about Palantir's FDP delivering benefit for the NHS are dubious, cherry-picked and should come with a serious health warning
publications.summary: Foxglove analysis disputing NHS England's claims that Palantir's Federated Data Platform increased operations.

publications.title: Our investigation shows a third of NHS trusts using Palantir's FDP tools are seeing fewer operations than before they started using it
publications.summary: Foxglove investigation into outcomes for NHS trusts using Palantir's FDP tools.

news.title: UK Government and Palantir must correct public record after NHS admits published data does not back up FDP benefit claims
news.summary: Press release calling on the UK Government and Palantir to correct the public record on FDP benefit claims.

news.title: More than 60 groups tell Home Office to stop using racist and faulty AI facial age estimation tech on asylum-seeking children
news.summary: Coalition statement against Home Office use of AI facial age estimation on asylum-seeking children.

news.title: Press release: UK regulator says Google must give journalists opt-out from AI theft, following Foxglove complaint
news.summary: Press release on a UK regulator decision following a Foxglove complaint against Google AI.

notes: News and posts from /feed/ RSS with real pubDates. Foxglove brings legal cases (e.g., Woodlands/Palantir) but as legal representatives/claimant supporters; no clearly named court case with Foxglove itself as the named party harvested into controversies.
